name: sci-research
description: Claude Code plugin for deep research, real-time news analysis, country-level daily news intelligence, multi-country branded briefings, company reputation tracking, and weekly macro & market reports with authoritative references

metadata.description: Six independent pipelines — deep research, real-time news scan, single-country daily news intelligence, multi-country branded briefing, company reputation tracking, and weekly macro & market report — powered by specialised agents with source credibility grading, per-URL date verification, editorial-desk filtering, FRED/BOE/BOJ/yfinance market data, and automated quality gates

plugins.name: sci-research
plugins.description: Six independent pipelines: (1) /sci-research — ≤5000-word comparative article from researcher → comparator → fact-checker → writer; (2) /news-scan — real-time news briefing with image extraction from news-scanner → news-imager → news-analyst; (3) /daily-news-intelligence — dated single-country daily news briefing in zh/en/ja from news-scanner → news-verifier → daily-news-writer with per-URL WebFetch date verification, T1-T4 source gating, editorial-desk filtering (originality + authority + impact + dedup), five-category coverage enforcement, and APA 7th references; (4) /daily-briefing — multi-country branded briefing rendered to docx; (5) /reputation-track — company reputation monitoring with adverse-media and social-listening; (6) /weekly-report — weekly macro & market report fusing prior-week daily briefings with live FRED / Bank of England / Bank of Japan / yfinance market data, three-stage aggregator → market-data-collector → writer pipeline in zh/en/ja with PostToolUse format-check hook
